steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/login and authenticate as validation.admin@example.com with company code MOCK
steps.observed: Successfully logged in and redirected to /hub

steps.action: Press Ctrl+K to open command palette
steps.expected: Modal opens with centered dialog and backdrop overlay
steps.observed: Command palette opened with a centered dialog (role=dialog, aria-modal=true) and a semi-transparent backdrop overlay (bg-black/20 with backdrop-blur-[2px])

steps.action: Inspect modal DOM structure for overlay/backdrop
steps.expected: Backdrop element exists behind modal dialog
steps.observed: Wrapper div with fixed inset-0 z-[var(--z-modal,800)], containing a child div with class 'absolute inset-0 bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-[2px]' acting as backdrop, plus the dialog element with box-shadow animation

steps.action: Press Escape key to dismiss modal
steps.expected: Modal closes and returns to previous page state
steps.observed: Command palette closed immediately after pressing Escape; interactive elements returned to hub state (portal buttons only)

steps.action: Take screenshot of modal open state
steps.expected: Screenshot captured showing modal with backdrop

evidence.network: N/A — no API calls involved in modal open/close

steps.expected: Users page loads with DataTable showing column headers and data rows
steps.observed: Users page loaded with heading 'User Management', DataTable with 5 column headers (User, Email, Role, Status, actions) and 6 data rows

steps.expected: Column headers visible: User, Email, Role, Status
steps.observed: 5 column headers rendered: User (sortable), Email (sortable), Role, Status (sortable), and an actions column. Headers use proper columnheader role in ARIA grid.

steps.expected: Data rows with user information visible
steps.observed: 6 data rows rendered with users: Validation Admin (Admin/Sales), Validation Accounting (Accounting), Validation Sales (Sales), Validation Factory (Factory), Validation Dealer (Dealer), Validation Super Admin (Admin/Super Admin). All showing 'Active' status.

steps.expected: Pagination shows row count and page controls
steps.observed: Pagination showing '1–6 of 6' with page size selector (10/25/50 rows) and previous/next buttons (disabled since all rows fit on one page)

steps.action: Resize viewport to 375px (mobile) to test horizontal scroll behavior
steps.expected: Table adapts to narrow viewport with horizontal scroll or card view
steps.observed: Table view is hidden on mobile (hidden sm:block) and replaced with a card-based layout showing each user as a card with name, email, and status. Mobile menu hamburger button appeared in header.

steps.action: Resize viewport to 768px (tablet) to test table view
steps.expected: Table visible with overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll if needed
steps.observed: Table visible at 768px (sm breakpoint passed), wrapper has overflow-x-auto class, scrollWidth equals clientWidth (718px) so no horizontal scroll needed at this width

steps.action: Take screenshots at full, tablet, and mobile viewports

evidence.network: Page loaded user data via API proxy — no errors

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-FOUNDATION-003 (Modal Component): Command palette opens with Ctrl+K, renders centered dialog with semi-transparent backdrop overlay (bg-black/20, backdrop-blur-[2px]), and Escape key dismisses correctly. VAL-FOUNDATION-004 (DataTable): Users table renders with 5 column headers and 6 data rows, pagination controls work, and responsive behavior is correct — table view at desktop/tablet widths with overflow-x-auto, card-based layout on mobile (375px). No console errors during testing.
